name: Harvest
tagline: Time tracking and invoicing for project-based businesses
description: Harvest combines time tracking with invoicing and expense tracking, making it popular with agencies, consultancies, and freelancers who bill by the hour. It integrates with project management tools to give a complete picture of project profitability.
pros: Best invoicing of any time tracker
cons: UI hasn't changed much in years
use_cases: Your agency or consultancy bills clients by the hour and needs tracked time to flow directly into invoices without manual re-entry
You want to see real-time project budget burn so you can flag scope creep before a project goes over
Your team uses tools like Asana, Basecamp, or Trello and needs time tracking that integrates into existing project workflows
You're a freelancer who needs simple, clean time tracking with invoicing built in — without paying for a full accounting platform
